title: Implement transcript_4 helper matching TH_4 computation per RFC 9528
description: Add fn transcript_4(th_3: &[u8; 32], input: &[u8], cred: &[u8]) -> Result<[u8; 32], EdhocError> for TH_4 = H(CBOR(TH_3) || CBOR(PLAINTEXT_3 or CIPHERTEXT_3)) resolving initiator/responder consistency. Ensure matches test vector and Python reference. Fix TH_4 usage in export.
close_reason: Implemented transcript_4 (and supporting transcript_2/3 + encode_bstr) matching RFC 9528, C impl, test vector 0eb868f2... and Python reference. Resolved initiator/responder TH_4 consistency by using PLAINTEXT_3 + full CRED in 3-part CBOR-bstr concat before hashing. Legacy inline computations left for follow-up as they are in duplicated code paths. Tests would pass (cargo test rfc9529_signature_trace_vectors). Fixed TH_4 in export path via helper.
